title: Charles Schwab to launch direct bitcoin, ethereum trading to compete with Robinhood
description: Charles Schwab is rolling out crypto trading, allowing clients to buy bitcoin and ether through a new arm called Schwab Crypto.

title: Quantum Computing's Crypto Threat Is Getting Real—and Investors Are Piling In
description: As quantum firms like D-Wave, IonQ, and Rigetti advance, the future security of digital assets like Bitcoin is driving a new investment theme.
